---
title: "conditional_analysis"
author: "Ziang Zhang"
date: "2025-10-20"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(fastTopics)
library(dplyr)
library(ggrepel)
data_path <- "../data/"
code_path <- "../code/"
# data_path <- "data/"
# code_path <- "code/"
source(paste0(code_path, "ROC.R"))
seurat_meta <- readRDS(paste0(data_path, "seurat_meta.rds"))
flashier_snmf_summary <- readRDS(paste0(data_path, "flashier_snmf_summary.rds"))
```


Align the cells to remove the extra cells in the flashier result:

```{r}
cells_flashier <- rownames(flashier_snmf_summary$L_pm)
cells_seurat <- seurat_meta$cellID
which(!cells_flashier %in% cells_seurat)
L_pm <- flashier_snmf_summary$L_pm[cells_flashier %in% cells_seurat, ]
all(rownames(L_pm) == cells_seurat)
```

Focus on healthy cells:

```{r}
healthy_cells <- which(seurat_meta$condition_broad == "healthy")
L_pm <- L_pm[healthy_cells, ]
seurat_meta <- seurat_meta[healthy_cells, ]
```

Filter out organs and cell types with too few cells:

```{r}
selected_organ <- table(seurat_meta$organ)
selected_organ <- names(selected_organ[selected_organ >= 500])
selected_level2 <- table(seurat_meta$annotation_level2)
selected_level2 <- names(selected_level2[selected_level2 >= 500])
selected_cells <- which(seurat_meta$organ %in% selected_organ & seurat_meta$annotation_level2 %in% selected_level2)
seurat_meta_selected <- seurat_meta[selected_cells, ]
# redefine the levels
seurat_meta_selected$organ <- factor(seurat_meta_selected$organ)
seurat_meta_selected$annotation_level2 <- factor(seurat_meta_selected$annotation_level2)
```

```{r}
# Run regression for a given factor
factor_id <- 3
Y <- L_pm[selected_cells, factor_id]
organ <- seurat_meta_selected$organ
level2 <- seurat_meta_selected$annotation_level2
model_full <- lm(Y ~ organ + level2)
```

```{r}
coefs <- coef(model_full)
# Extract coefficients for organ
organ_coefs <- coefs[grep("^organ", names(coefs))]
# Extract coefficients for annotation_level2
level2_coefs <- coefs[grep("^level2", names(coefs))]

# Extract SE for organ
organ_se <- summary(model_full)$coefficients[grep("^organ", rownames(summary(model_full)$coefficients)), "Std. Error"]
# Extract SE for annotation_level2
level2_se <- summary(model_full)$coefficients[grep("^level2", rownames(summary(model_full)$coefficients)), "Std. Error"]

# Create data frames for plotting
coef_df <- data.frame(
  Category = c(rep("Organ", length(organ_coefs)), rep("Cell Type", length(level2_coefs))),
  Name = c(names(organ_coefs), names(level2_coefs)),
  Coefficient = c(organ_coefs, level2_coefs),
  SE = c(organ_se, level2_se)
)

# rename the levels to more readable format
coef_df$Name <- gsub("organ", "", coef_df$Name)
coef_df$Name <- gsub("level2", "", coef_df$Name)

# Add |coef| for ranking
coef_df <- coef_df %>% mutate(AbsCoef = abs(Coefficient))

top_k <- 15  # change as you like

## A) Label overall top-|coef| across both categories
top_overall <- coef_df %>% slice_max(AbsCoef, n = top_k, with_ties = FALSE)

ggplot(coef_df, aes(x = Coefficient, y = SE, color = Category)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top_overall,
    aes(label = Name),
    size = 3,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    box.padding = 0.3,
    point.padding = 0.2,
    min.segment.length = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Factor", factor_id, "Coefficient Estimates vs SE"),
    x = "Coefficient Estimate",
    y = "Standard Error"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

```

Write a function that computes the coefficients of organ and cell type for each factor:

```{r}
compute_coef_per_factor <- function(factor_id){
  Y <- L_pm[selected_cells, factor_id]
  organ <- seurat_meta_selected$organ
  level2 <- seurat_meta_selected$annotation_level2
  model_full <- lm(Y ~ organ + level2)
  coefs <- coef(model_full)
  # Extract coefficients for organ
  organ_coefs <- coefs[grep("^organ", names(coefs))]
  # Extract coefficients for annotation_level2
  level2_coefs <- coefs[grep("^level2", names(coefs))]
  
  return(
    list(
      factor_id = factor_id,
      organ_coefs = organ_coefs,
      level2_coefs = level2_coefs
    )
  )
}
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
factor_coef_list <- lapply(1:ncol(L_pm), compute_coef_per_factor)
saveRDS(factor_coef_list, file = paste0(data_path, "conditional_analysis_factor.rds"))
```


Write a function that computes the mean/sd of organ and cell type coefficients for each factor:

```{r}
compute_coef_stats_per_factor <- function(factor_id){
  Y <- L_pm[selected_cells, factor_id]
  organ <- seurat_meta_selected$organ
  level2 <- seurat_meta_selected$annotation_level2
  model_full <- lm(Y ~ organ + level2)
  coefs <- coef(model_full)
  # Extract coefficients for organ
  organ_coefs <- coefs[grep("^organ", names(coefs))]
  # Extract coefficients for annotation_level2
  level2_coefs <- coefs[grep("^level2", names(coefs))]
  
  organ_mean <- mean(organ_coefs)
  organ_sd <- sd(organ_coefs)
  level2_mean <- mean(level2_coefs)
  level2_sd <- sd(level2_coefs)
  
  return(data.frame(
    Factor = factor_id,
    Organ_Mean = organ_mean,
    Organ_SD = organ_sd,
    CellType_Mean = level2_mean,
    CellType_SD = level2_sd
  ))
}
```

Obtain the whole summary table:

```{r eval=FALSE}
factor_stats_list <- lapply(1:ncol(L_pm), compute_coef_stats_per_factor)
factor_stats_df <- do.call(rbind, factor_stats_list)
saveRDS(factor_stats_df, file = paste0(data_path, "conditional_analysis_factor_stats.rds"))
```

```{r}
factor_stats_df <- readRDS(file = paste0(data_path, "conditional_analysis_factor_stats.rds"))

plot_factor_mean_sd <- function(df, mean_col, sd_col,
                                color = "blue",
                                title = "",
                                top_k = 10) {

  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      Mean = .data[[mean_col]],
      SD = .data[[sd_col]],
      AbsMean = abs(Mean)
    )

  # top_k by SD and |Mean|
  top_sd <- df %>% slice_max(SD, n = top_k, with_ties = FALSE)
  top_mean <- df %>% slice_max(AbsMean, n = top_k, with_ties = FALSE)
  label_df <- bind_rows(top_sd, top_mean) %>% distinct(Factor, .keep_all = TRUE)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = SD, y = Mean)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = color) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = label_df,
      aes(label = Factor),
      size = 3,
      box.padding = 0.3,
      point.padding = 0.2,
      min.segment.length = 0,
      max.overlaps = Inf
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = "Standard Deviation",
      y = "Mean"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
}

# --- Example usage ---
p_org <- plot_factor_mean_sd(
  factor_stats_df,
  mean_col = "Organ_Mean",
  sd_col   = "Organ_SD",
  color = "blue",
  title = "Organ Coefficient Mean vs SD",
  top_k = 5
)

p_cell <- plot_factor_mean_sd(
  factor_stats_df,
  mean_col = "CellType_Mean",
  sd_col   = "CellType_SD",
  color = "green",
  title = "Cell Type Coefficient Mean vs SD",
  top_k = 5
)

p_org
p_cell
```
